title: Battered Snapper Tacos
description: A Mexican-inspired dish featuring crispy battered snapper, served with a side of warm flour tortillas and a sprinkle of red knots. Perfect for a light and refreshing meal.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Prepare the snapper fillets by patting them dry with paper towels.
In a bowl, mix together flour and a pinch of salt.
Dredge the snapper fillets in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Carefully place the battered snapper in the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Drain the fried snapper on paper towels.
Warm flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of fried snapper on each tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of red knots.
